creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Goran :-)

Can you fix this please?

:~/dev/ports/dns/py-dns-lexicon % portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/devel/py-future@py27 found, even though it is listed in RUN_DEPENDS.
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/dns/py-tldextract@py27 found, even though it is listed in RUN_DEPENDS.
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/www/py-requests@py27 found, even though it is listed in RUN_DEPENDS.
0 fatal errors and 4 warnings found.

Greetings
Jochen
